name: io.github.kubecon-eu-mcp/kubecon-eu-mcp
title: KubeCon EU 2026 Conference Guide
description: MCP server for KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026 — agentic schedule planner, party optimizer, venue guide, and travel info. Fetches live data from sched.com and conferenceparties.com.

tools.name: search_sessions
tools.description: Search conference sessions by topic, speaker, or keyword

tools.name: get_schedule
tools.description: Get the full schedule for a specific day

tools.name: find_speaker
tools.description: Find sessions by a specific speaker

tools.name: find_parties
tools.description: Find conference parties and social events

tools.name: get_venue_info
tools.description: Venue details, room list, maps, transit

tools.name: get_hotel_info
tools.description: Conference hotel blocks with rates and distances

tools.name: get_colocated_events
tools.description: Monday co-located events (ArgoCon, CiliumCon, Agentics Day, etc.)

tools.name: get_conference_overview
tools.description: High-level event overview and useful links

tools.name: score_sessions
tools.description: Get sessions with a personalized scoring rubric for AI-powered ranking

tools.name: detect_conflicts
tools.description: Check if selected sessions overlap in time
